evals.name: full-release-pipeline
evals.prompt: Pro just shipped 3.47.10. Can you cut a matching Lite release? Assume Dependabot is clean and my local working tree is clean.
evals.expected_output: Skill runs Phase 0 pre-flight, then walks Phase 1-6 in order, pausing for changelog review (Phase 4) and version confirmation (Phase 0). Stops at Phase 7 and asks me to run the CRM smoke-test before tagging. Does NOT push anything without explicit confirmation.

assertions.text: Skill verifies wp-fusion sibling directory exists before syncing
Skill runs gh pr list for Dependabot PRs and reports
Skill checks git status is clean before sync
sync_from_pro.sh is invoked
patch_main_file.py is invoked
replace_textdomain.py is invoked
filter_changelog.py is invoked with an --output path (temp file for review)
bump_version.py is invoked with 3.47.10 as the argument
verify_sync.sh is invoked
Skill STOPS at Phase 7 and prompts for CRM smoke-test confirmation — does not proceed to git commit or tag push
No `git push` command is executed in the transcript

evals.name: dry-run-diff-review
evals.prompt: I want to see what would change if I synced Lite from Pro right now. Don't actually write anything — just show me a diff of the changelog and which files would be touched.
evals.expected_output: Skill runs sync_from_pro.sh --dry-run, filter_changelog.py to stdout, replace_textdomain.py --dry-run, and reports counts + proposed changelog. Never actually modifies files.

assertions.text: At least one script is invoked with --dry-run
Skill runs filter_changelog.py and shows proposed Lite changelog
Skill reports count of dropped bullets (integration-specific) vs kept
No actual file writes occur in the Lite repo (verified via git status)

evals.name: resume-after-smoke-test
evals.prompt: OK I did the smoke test, Lite works against HubSpot and ActiveCampaign with no errors. Tag it and push.
evals.expected_output: Skill runs verify_sync.sh first (must pass), then git add/commit/tag, then asks ONE more time for confirmation before pushing the tag. After confirmation, pushes and watches the workflow run.

assertions.text: Skill runs verify_sync.sh before committing
Commit message is the version string (matches existing repo convention)
Skill asks for explicit confirmation before git push
Skill runs gh run watch or equivalent after the push succeeds
Skill reports the GitHub release URL, Actions run URL, and wordpress.org plugin URL at the end
